title: System Response to External Input: The Zero-State Response
summary: This page is a figure page illustrating the convolution operation graphically. It shows the input and impulse response, their time-reversed and shifted forms, overlap areas for different shift values, and the resulting output c(t).

figures.caption: Graphical explanation of the convolution operation with subplots (a) through (i), showing x(t), g(t), flipped and shifted signals, overlap areas, and resulting c(t)
